sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id UInt32, ip String);
SELECT id, toIPv6OrDefault(ip) AS ipv6 FROM ip_addresses;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ip = toIPv6OrDefault('invalid_ip', '::1') WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, toIPv6OrDefault(ip, '2001:0db8:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0001') AS ipv6 FROM ip_addresses;
